title: English Housing Survey 2018 to 2019: housing across the life course
body: "This report provides findings from the 2018 to 2019 survey and examines the housing circumstances of 3 different age cohorts: 16 to 34 year olds, 35 to 64 year olds and those aged 65 and over.  The English Housing Survey live tables are updated each year and accompany the annual reports. "
